head: 50b3a8abbfc342ed7c96c019071d355d63ec733a
inspection_summary: Story, Architecture, Spec, owner/runtime boundaries, unit and E2E tests, current-head verification evidence, and conformance evidence were independently inspected. Focused tests passed 14/14.
judgment_delta: Independence, serial-stage/parallel-role barriers, deterministic restart reservations, verdict propagation, and the 69-to-69 conformance non-regression were challenged and found sound. Reserved dispatch uses stable run/head/stage-role identity and crash/restart tests confirm reuse rather than duplicate provider execution.
